Notes & Terms
  • Prices are shown in USD. Monthly retainers are billed on a monthly basis with no lock-in beyond the agreed scope.
  • Custom pricing is based on scope, complexity, and ongoing management needs. A 30–45 minute discovery call is recommended before any custom buildout begins.
  • Ad spend is not included in management retainer fees. Certain projects may require one-time setup fees depending on access requirements, existing assets, and migration complexity.
  • For best results, ensure tracking infrastructure, CRM data hygiene, and a fast lead-response SLA are in place before engagement begins.
  • The bundle rate is designed for fast deployment and consistent iteration — best value for businesses ready to run a full-stack growth system from day one.
